tools.name: search_registry
tools.description: Search Crucible's animated React components by keyword, category, or tier. Returns names, descriptions, and dependencies. Use get_component to fetch source.

tools.name: get_component
tools.description: Fetch the full TypeScript source of a Crucible component, ready to drop into a shadcn-style project. Pro components require an Authorization: Bearer <CRUCIBLE_TOKEN> header (get a token at https://crucibleui.com/account).

tools.name: install_instructions
tools.description: How to install a Crucible component into a project: shadcn CLI command, registry config, and npm dependencies.

tools.name: get_usage
tools.description: Show how to USE a Crucible component correctly: a worked example (its demo source) plus the conventions that make it render — notably the `relative isolate` wrapper that background components require. Call this before writing integration code so the install actually renders.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "get_component" references sensitive artifacts (authorization, bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.
